title: GNDU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: GNDU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Guru Nanak Dev University Result 2026 declared for various UG and PG 1st, 3rd, 5th and other semester/annual examinations on the official website - online.gndu.ac.in via gnduresult.org. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the GNDU result using your 11 digit roll number.

content.text: Guru Nanak Dev University has activated the GNDU Result 2026 portal for semester and annual system UG/PG examinations, allowing students to check their latest exam results with an 11 digit roll number. GNDU Result 2026 has been published online on the official result site gnduresult.org, which can be accessed directly as well as through the main university portal online.gndu.ac.in.

Both undergraduate and postgraduate students can view their 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th semester or annual exam results by selecting the appropriate result type (Semester/Annual System New UG/PG) and entering their roll number. After downloading the online marksheet, students should verify their personal details, subject wise marks, total marks and result status and contact the university examination branch or their college if any discrepancy is noticed.

The GNDU Results 2026 section provides a unified interface for new semester and annual system UG and PG courses, covering a wide range of programmes like BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA, BTech, MA, MSc, MCom and other professional courses. The system is configured to accept 11 digit roll numbers, ensuring accurate retrieval of individual results for each examination session.
GNDU hosts all its semester/annual UG and PG results through the independent result portal, where a dedicated Student Area page is available for direct roll number-based result search.

links.label: Semester/Annual System New (UG / PG) Result (11 Digits Roll Number)
GNDU Examination Results Home (All Declared Results)
GNDU Online Portal (For Exams, Admissions and Results)

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your GNDU Result 2026 for semester/annual UG or PG exams:

items: Open the official GNDU result portal: https://gnduresult.org/examination-results.php.
On the results page, click on the link “Semester/Annual System New (UG / PG) (11 Digits Roll Number)” or go directly to https://gnduresult.org/studentarea/gnduexamresult.php.
On the student result screen, ensure the correct result category/exam type is selected (as shown or pre-selected).
Enter your 11 digit Roll Number exactly as printed on your GNDU exam admit card or marksheet.
Click on the Submit / Search / View Result button to open your result.
Your result will display name, roll number, course, semester/year, subject wise marks/grades, total marks and result status.
Download or print the provisional marksheet for record, revaluation applications, scholarship, counselling or higher semester admission.
